solution.p: The first step is to subtract terms in order to separate the variable and non-variable terms. \begin{aligned} 9A +8 \amp = A +48 \\ 9A +8\mathbf{{}-A-8} \amp = A +48\mathbf{{}-A-8} \\ 8A \amp = 40 \\ \frac{8A}{8} \amp = \frac{40}{8} \\ A \amp = 5 \end{aligned}

The solution to this equation is 5. To stress that this is a value assigned to A, some report A = 5. We can also say that the solution set is \{5\}, or that A\in\left\{5\right\}. If we substitute 5 in for A in the original equation 9A+8=A+48, the equation will be true. Please check this on your own; it is an important habit.
